title: Daily briefing: The battery that could change everything
authors: Flora Graham
abstract: Published online: 15 July 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-02249-2 How sodium-ion batteries could change the world. Plus, the evolution of handedness with an ancient worm and how scientists are revealing the mysteries of the deep ocean.

title: Building chemical stability with mechanics
authors: Jin Hwan Kwak
Wonchan Hwang
Jungjin Park
abstract: Published online: 16 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41560-026-02044-3 <mark>Stack pressure</mark> strongly influences degradation pathways in lithium-ion batteries, yet its optimal value remains poorly understood. Now, a high-precision <mark>stack pressure</mark> control and dilatometry system reveals an optimal pressure window that suppresses key degradation pathways and doubles battery lifetime.
